overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an underground industrial market with various food stalls and vendors. The environment features neon lighting, concrete pillars, metal shutters, and a mix of warm and cool artificial lights creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground industrial market corridor with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market corridor toward a lit food stall

entered.detail: food stall with green Japanese '営業中' sign and warm overhead lighting
red illuminated vending machine with beverage advertisements
large cylindrical concrete pillar with yellow base
distant neon signage glowing in the background haze

segments.scene_description: Walking through an underground industrial market corridor with concrete floors and pillars. Approaching a ramen food stall with a green '営業中' sign and warm lighting. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the background near various stalls.

events.description: turns left toward the antique goods stall while passing the ramen vendor

agents.ego_description: turning left to approach a different stall while glancing at the ramen vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor in white shirt standing behind the ramen stall counter

entered.detail: stall with blue and white porcelain jars and stacked books on counter
large blue and white ceramic jars on display
open cardboard box with books or magazines

segments.scene_description: Turning left toward an antique goods stall while passing the ramen vendor. The scene shifts focus from the initial food stall to a counter with blue and white porcelain jars and stacked books. The vendor in a white shirt remains visible behind the first counter.

agents.ego_description: approaching the antique stall counter to examine the goods

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue tank top arranging items behind the counter

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with boxes and ceramics
stack of books and magazines on the counter

segments.scene_description: Approaching the antique stall where a vendor in a blue tank top stands behind a counter filled with porcelain jars and books. Metal shelving units line the wall behind the counter, and a cardboard box sits on the right side of the frame.

events.description: red neon light from food cart becomes prominent on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the antique stall toward a neon-lit area

notable_agents.action: person in neon green pants and silver jacket sitting on a small food cart

entered.detail: small cart with bright orange neon rectangular sign
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and tags

segments.scene_description: Moving past the antique stall toward a graffiti-covered wall area. A person wearing neon green pants and a silver jacket sits on a small food cart with a glowing red neon sign. The lighting shifts to include more red tones from the neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: Wagami Market area with red banner

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market area toward the Wagami Market banner

closed metal roll-up shutters with yellow bases

segments.scene_description: Walking past the neon cart and under circular overhead lights toward the 'Wagami Market' area marked by a large red vertical banner. Two people stand conversing near metal shutters in the background while the camera moves through the open market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated food stall with advertisement posters

events.description: approaching stall with bright blue-white fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the final food stall with bright lighting

notable_agents.action: female vendor standing behind the illuminated counter

entered.detail: food stall with 'THE BIG EAT SHOW' advertisement posters on front
illuminated digital display showing menu items
posters for 'The Big Eat Show' and 'All Foods' on stall front

segments.scene_description: Approaching a brightly lit food stall with 'The Big Eat Show' advertisement posters on the front. A female vendor stands behind the illuminated counter in a section with prominent blue-white fluorescent lighting and industrial metal shutters visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an underground industrial market, transitioning from warm food stalls to a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub. It begins by moving through a concrete corridor toward a ramen stall illuminated by a green sign and warm lighting, before turning left to pass a vendor in a white shirt. The camera then shifts focus toward an antique stall filled with porcelain jars and books, moving past a vendor in a blue tank top and metal shelving units. As the path opens up, the lighting shifts to include red tones from a glowing neon sign where a person in a silver jacket sits, leading the camera under circular overhead lights toward a large red Wagami Market banner. Finally, the movement concludes by approaching a brightly lit food stall featuring The Big Eat Show posters and a female vendor under cool blue-white fluorescent lighting.
